# flashalpha (JavaScript / TypeScript SDK)

> Official Node.js SDK for the [FlashAlpha](https://flashalpha.com)
> options analytics API. Live dealer-positioning data — gamma exposure
> (GEX), delta exposure (DEX), vanna / charm exposure (VEX / CHEX),
> max pain, 0DTE analytics, variance risk premium (VRP), implied vol
> surface, Black-Scholes-Merton greeks, Kelly position sizing, and a
> live options screener — exposed as a single `FlashAlpha` class with
> typed responses on every endpoint. Node 18+, zero runtime deps.

## What FlashAlpha is

FlashAlpha is a real-time options analytics API focused on **dealer
positioning** — the inventory market makers carry from selling options
to retail and institutions, and the hedging flow that inventory forces
into spot. The headline analytics:

- **Gamma exposure (GEX)**: dollar gamma dealers must re-hedge per 1%
  spot move. Positive = mean-reverting tape; negative = trend-amplifying.
- **Gamma flip, call wall, put wall**: the strike where dealer gamma
  crosses zero, plus the highest-absolute-call-GEX and put-GEX strikes
  (resistance and support).
- **0DTE analytics**: pin risk, expected move, hedging buckets,
  dealer-flow decomposition for the same-day expiry.
- **Variance risk premium (VRP)**: spread between implied and realized
  vol, with directional skew, term structure, GEX-conditioning, and a
  0-100 harvest score.
- **Max pain**: strike where total option-holder pain is minimized,
  with dealer-alignment overlay and pin probability.

## What this SDK provides

A single `FlashAlpha` client class wrapping every public endpoint, with:

- TypeScript interfaces for the major response shapes (rich JSDoc on
  load-bearing fields — autocomplete in any editor, runtime cost zero)
- typed errors (`AuthenticationError`, `TierRestrictedError`,
  `RateLimitError`, `NotFoundError`, `ServerError`, `FlashAlphaError`)
- Node-native `fetch` and `AbortController` (no axios, no node-fetch)

Quick start:

```ts
import { FlashAlpha } from 'flashalpha';

const fa = new FlashAlpha(process.env.FLASHALPHA_API_KEY!);

const summary = await fa.exposureSummary('SPY');
console.log(summary.regime, summary.gamma_flip);
```

## Key endpoints

- `stockSummary(symbol)` — single best snapshot: price + IV + HV + VRP
  + skew + term structure + flow + full exposure + macro in one call.
- `exposureSummary(symbol)` — regime, GEX/DEX/VEX/CHEX, gamma flip,
  walls, hedging estimate (Growth+).
- `exposureLevels(symbol)` — just the key support/resistance strikes
  (gamma flip, walls, max pos/neg gamma, highest OI, 0DTE magnet).
- `narrative(symbol)` — LLM-friendly verbal output of the exposure
  block, safe to surface verbatim into a chat UI (Growth+).
- `zeroDte(symbol)` — full 0DTE dashboard: regime, expected move, pin
  risk, hedging by spot bucket, decay, vol context, flow, levels
  (Growth+).
- `vrp(symbol)` — variance risk premium dashboard with directional
  skew, term structure, GEX-conditioning, and harvest score (Alpha+).
- `maxPain(symbol)` — max pain strike, pain curve, dealer alignment,
  pin probability (Growth+).
- `gex(symbol)` / `dex` / `vex` / `chex` — exposure curves by strike.
- `greeks(opts)` — full BSM theoretical price + first/second/third-order
  greeks for any (spot, strike, dte, sigma) point (public).
- `iv(opts)` — implied vol from a market price.
- `kelly(opts)` — Kelly-criterion optimal position sizing (Growth+).
- `screener(opts)` — filter/rank symbols by GEX, VRP, IV, greeks,
  harvest scores, or custom formulas (Growth+).

### Flow — live, simulation-aware (Alpha+)

Intraday trade-tape-adjusted dealer exposure plus the raw options/stock
flow feed — 24 methods under `/v1/flow/*`:

- **Analytics**: `flowLevels`, `flowPinRisk`, `flowSummary`, `flowOi`,
  `flowGex`, `flowDex`, `flowDealerRisk`, `flowLive` — live gamma flip /
  call & put walls / max pain, 0DTE pin score, flow direction + headline
  GEX shift, OI simulator state, flow-adjusted GEX/DEX per strike,
  settled-vs-live dealer risk, and an everything-at-once bundle. Optional
  `{ expiry }` slice.
- **Unusual-flow signals**: `flowSignals` / `flowSignalsSummary` —
  scored, classified per-print signals (block/sweep, NBBO aggressor,
  opening/closing bias, intent) with a 0-100 composite score,
  chain-context enrichment, and a net bullish/bearish + opening/closing
  premium roll-up.
- **Raw flow**: `flowOptionRecent` / `flowOptionSummary` /
  `flowOptionBlocks` / `flowOptionHistory` / `flowOptionCumulative`, the
  `flowStock*` equivalents, and cross-symbol `flowOptionsLeaderboard` /
  `flowOptionsOutliers` / `flowStocksLeaderboard` / `flowStocksOutliers`
  — per-trade prints, large blocks, per-minute buckets, cumulative
  net-flow series, ranked leaderboards / outliers.

Full method list with parameters lives in the
[README](https://github.com/FlashAlpha-lab/flashalpha-js).

### Strategy signals (`/v1/strategies/*`)

Ten one-call trade-signal endpoints, each returning the same
`StrategyDecisionResponse` envelope (action, conviction, best matching
multi-leg structure with legs, risk flags, data quality):
`strategyFlowAnomaly`, `strategyExpiryPositioning`, `strategyZeroDte`,
`strategyDealerRegime`, `strategyVolCarry`, `strategyYieldEnhancement`,
`strategySurfaceAnomaly`, `strategySkew`, `strategyTermStructure`,
`strategyTailPricing`. Tiers vary (Basic+ / Growth+ / Alpha+).

### Earnings (`/v1/earnings/*`)

Eight endpoints for trading the event: `earningsCalendar` (upcoming
events with implied moves), `earningsExpectedMove` (implied-move
decomposition), `earningsHistory` (implied vs actual move, IV crush),
`earningsIvCrush`, `earningsVrp` (earnings variance risk premium),
`earningsDealerPositioning`, `earningsStrategies` (straddle/strangle/
condor suitability), `earningsScreener` (cross-sectional rank by VRP /
crush / move). Growth+ / Alpha+.

### Structures (`POST /v1/structures/*`)

Pure-math multi-leg analytics, no market data required:
`structurePnl` (at-expiry P&L curve, breakevens, max profit/loss) and
`structureGreeks` (aggregate BSM position Greeks). Basic+.

### Zero-DTE flow (`/v1/flow/zero-dte/*`)

`flowZeroDteSnapshot`, `flowZeroDteSeries`, `flowZeroDteHedgeFlow`,
`flowZeroDteHeatmap` (strike × time gex/dex/vex/chex/oi/signed_flow),
`flowZeroDteStrikeFlow` (per-strike signed delta/gamma dollars).
Growth+ / Alpha+.

### Vol surface, correlation & macro

- `surfaceSvi(symbol)` — live SVI-fitted surface parameters per expiry
  (Alpha+).
- `expectedMove(symbol)` — straddle-implied expected move per expiry
  (Basic+).
- `liquidity(symbol)` — per-expiry execution/liquidity scores (Growth+).
- `skewTerm(symbol)` — skew term structure (risk reversal, butterfly)
  (Growth+).
- `spotVolCorrelation(symbol)` — rolling 20d/60d spot/vol correlation
  (Growth+).
- `dispersion({ index, symbols })` — implied vs realized correlation /
  dispersion for an index basket (Alpha+).
- `realizedVolatility(symbol)` — range-based realized vol estimators
  (close-to-close, Parkinson, Garman-Klass, Rogers-Satchell, Yang-Zhang)
  over 10/20/30-day windows (Alpha+).
- `volatilityForecast(symbol, { dist })` — conditional vol forecasts
  (EWMA, HAR-RV, GARCH(1,1) MLE) (Alpha+).
- `vixState()` — VIX overvixing/undervixing regime (Growth+).
- `universe()` — curated queryable symbol directory (public).
- `vrpHistory(symbol)` — daily VRP time series (Alpha+).
- `vrp(symbol, { date })` — historical VRP snapshot for a session.
- `exposureSheet` / `exposureTermStructure` / `exposureBasket` /
  `exposureOiDiff` — unified per-strike sheet, per-DTE-bucket greeks,
  weighted cross-symbol basket, and day-over-day OI deltas (Growth+).
- `flowDealerPremium(symbol)` — full-tape Net Dealer Premium (Alpha+).
- `flowStockBars(symbol, { resolution })` — multi-resolution OHLCV+flow
  bars (Alpha+).
- `screenerFields()` — list the queryable screener fields and types.

## Try without writing code

- Interactive playground (Swagger UI): https://lab.flashalpha.com/swagger
- Sign up for an API key: https://flashalpha.com

## Tiers

FlashAlpha has four tiers — every endpoint declares its minimum tier:

- **Free**: public endpoints (`health`, `tickers`, `stockQuote`,
  `surface`, `gex`, `dex`, `vex`, `chex`, `greeks`, `iv`, `account`).
- **Basic+**: adds `maxPain`, `expectedMove`, `structurePnl`,
  `structureGreeks`, and the Basic-tier strategy signals.
- **Growth+**: adds `exposureSummary`, `exposureLevels`, `exposureSheet`,
  `exposureTermStructure`, `exposureBasket`, `exposureOiDiff`,
  `narrative`, `zeroDte`, `optionQuote`, `volatility`, `liquidity`,
  `skewTerm`, `spotVolCorrelation`, `vixState`, `kelly`, `screener`, the
  earnings calendar/history/expected-move/IV-crush endpoints, the
  zero-DTE flow snapshot/series/hedge-flow endpoints, and the Growth-tier
  strategy signals.
- **Alpha+**: adds `vrp` (+ `vrp({ date })` and `vrpHistory`),
  `advVolatility` (SVI calibration, variance surface, arbitrage
  detection), `surfaceSvi`, `dispersion`, `realizedVolatility`,
  `volatilityForecast`, the earnings VRP / dealer
  positioning / strategies / screener endpoints, the zero-DTE flow
  heatmap / strike-flow endpoints, `flowDealerPremium`, `flowStockBars`,
  the Alpha-tier strategy signals, and the full `flow*` tier (24
  simulation-aware + signals + raw options/stock flow endpoints).

Pricing and tier comparison: https://flashalpha.com.

## Companion SDKs

- `flashalpha-historical` — point-in-time replay of every analytic
  back to 2018-04-16, same response shapes, with built-in backtester.
- Python, .NET, Java, Go SDKs at https://github.com/FlashAlpha-lab.
